title: Pairing payload (v2) — the QR/JSON the edge prints for the companion app

token.description: The pre-shared control_token (sent as Authorization: Bearer)

wifi.description: AutoPi AP credentials for the programmatic WiFi join. Omitted when unknown (dev boxes without an AP); consumers must tolerate its absence and behave as with a v1 payload.

ssid.description: AP SSID, e.g. AutoPi-<last12 of unit id> (32 is the IEEE 802.11 limit)
